headline: Cintas Seen Posting Modest Q3 Beat, Possible Guidance Raise Despite Oil Cost Pressure, RBC Says
summary: Cintas (CTAS) could deliver a modest earnings beat in its fiscal Q3 and may raise its full-year outl

headline: Duluth Holdings (DLTH) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
summary: Duluth Holdings (DLTH) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +155.56% and +2.61%, respectively, for the quarter ended January 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
